[Get up to 75% OFF + FREE Gift!†](https://www.qualialife.com/shop)

![Qualia](https://cdn1.neurohacker.com/k0s8wwuv2h4dcqne1v1ft6eisymv.png)
![Qualia](https://cdn1.neurohacker.com/ah0qdugya98d95v0xeqfexsyrgsm.png)

# Unrivaled Science. Unprecedented Results.

Great health requires great science. Our award-winning science team is pioneering higher standards in supplementation with human studies on every formula, redefining how well you can age and live.

1M+ purchases

[Shop Qualia](/shop?click_source=home-hero)

![](https://cdn1.neurohacker.com/offo4vi6o8k6fodnicuqni2lxb3s.webp)
![Non-GMO icon](https://cdn1.neurohacker.com/2kxgsss8ur3tr85sua2mm4qahi0e.png)

![Ethically Sourced icon](https://cdn1.neurohacker.com/1venawivk40axwp2phw9oybpt9nm.png)

## Factoring The Full Picture Of Human Health

Our pioneering science team crafts formulas with ingredients that are complementary to each other (and your body's natural regulatory systems), for profound health benefits.

[Shop Qualia](/shop)

#### Renowned Doctors, Health Influencers & Athletes Who Love Qualia

![Qualia Mind]()

## Qualia Mind 2.0

For nearly a decade, **Qualia Mind** has set the gold standard in supporting short and long term brain health through advanced, science-backed nourishment, with hundreds of thousands experiencing a life-changing difference to their focus, memory, mood and motivation. Our new **Mind 2.0 formula** packs even greater cognitive support into this legendary formula, to help you capture the best mindset of your life.\*

[Shop Qualia Mind 2.0](/shop/qualia-mind)

![Qualia Senolytic]()

## Qualia Senolytic

**If you want to feel younger,** a good place to start is limiting senescent cell accumulation. Senescent cells are old worn out cells no longer serving their intended function for our health, wasting our energy and nutrition. They begin significantly accumulating in us past age 30. Qualia Senolytic is a clinically tested formula packed with 9 vegan, non-GMO ingredients to help naturally eliminate senescent cells, to support:\*

[Shop Qualia Senolytic](/shop/qualia-senolytic)

![Qualia NAD+]()

## Qualia NAD+

**NAD+** is a molecule in every living cell of your body, and is absolutely crucial to aging well. But by age 50, most peoples' NAD+ levels have fallen to half of what they were at age 20, negatively accelerating countless aspects of aging. **Qualia NAD+** is **clinically proven**, in multiple double-blind placebo-controlled trials, to boost NAD+ levels by 67%\*, so you can *reawaken your prime* for decades to come.\*

[Shop Qualia NAD+](/shop/qualia-nad)

## Brand Promise

![two capsules]()

### Delivering The Best Supplements In The World

[Learn More](#)

![quality ingredients]()

### Ridiculously High Ingredient & Quality Standards

[Learn More](#)

![money back guarantee]()

### And If You Disagree? You Don't Pay.

[Learn More](#)

![woman writing on whiteboard]()

## Qualia Formulation Approach

The quality control standard behind every Qualia product is the defining characteristic of our brand. The unparalleled scientific rigor, which includes detailed considerations of ingredient bioavailability, potency, and synergies between ingredients, define every Qualia formula. That's why we're proud to provide transparent formula information and world class customer service to inform your health journey with us as much as possible.

Our formulas are informed by complexity science, which values the adaptive system of the human body. We seek to support, rather than override, the body's natural regulatory processes.

Top scientists in complex-systems modeling, neurobiology, organic chemistry, PhD and MD advisors contribute to Qualia product ideation, formulation and testing.

Qualia ingredients are chosen based on the strong empirical basis for their role in the formulation and their known safety.

We take great care to use potent, high-purity, and bioavailable forms of each ingredient that are ethically sourced, gluten-free and non-GMO.

We are 100% transparent, publishing the ingredients, dosages, and formula rationale, in each of our products.

We include meaningful dosages of each ingredient for their intended purpose in every Qualia product, while also respecting the synergies between related ingredients.

## Science Team

Medical Advisor

Naturopath focused on dementia care, founder of Marama, and author of research on cognitive decline and Alzheimer's reversal.

Sara Adães, Ph.D.

Senior Research Scientist

Biochemist with a focus on neuropharmacology, published researcher in neuroscience, contributing to Qualia Life Sciences for 10+ years.

Shawn Ramer, Ph.D.

Chief Science Officer

Bioorganic chemist with a Ph.D. from Harvard, R&D leader, and part of Qualia Life Sciences since 2016.

Sarah Blomquist, Ph.D.

Research Scientist

Specializes in nutritional and botanical research, with a background in neuroscience and molecular biology at Qualia Life Sciences.

Colin Gardner, Ph.D.

Research Associate

Specializes in neuroscience and supplement research, with a background in clinical studies and scientific communication at Qualia Life Sciences.

Dan Pardi, Ph.D.

Chief Health Officer

Holds a PhD in Cognitive Neuroscience from Leiden University and Stanford, founder of [humanOS.me](http://humanOS.me), and healthspan and peak performance educator.

## From the Blog

Topics to stimulate your thinking, feeling and achievement.

![Creatine Monohydrate Benefits]()

### [Creatine Monohydrate Benefits](/creatine-monohydrate-benefits)

by Darrell Grable

Learn why creatine monohydrate is the gold standard for performance, recovery, and cognition. Read about creatine monohydrate benefits.

[Read More](/creatine-monohydrate-benefits)

![]()

### [Qualia Stem Cell Review: Does It Really Work?](/qualia-stem-cell-energy-review)

by Darrell Grable

[Read More](/qualia-stem-cell-energy-review)

![]()

### [Best Magnesium for Sleep: What the Research Actually Shows](/magnesium-sleep)

by Dan Pardi, MS, Ph.D.

[Read More](/magnesium-sleep)

![]()

### [Should You Take Creatine Before Or After A Workout?](/should-you-take-creatine-before-or-after-workouts)

by Darrell Grable

[Read More](/should-you-take-creatine-before-or-after-workouts)

![]()

### [How Long Does It Take NAD Supplements to Work?](/how-long-nad-supplements-work)

by Darrell Grable

[Read More](/how-long-nad-supplements-work)

#### Delivering The Best Supplements In The World

Qualia pioneered the use of complex systems science in R&D for supplements. This field of study goes far beyond merely using premium ingredients. It also considers the synergies of how they do (or do not) work together. In this uncompromising research, we study all physiological systems in extraordinary depth, factoring how different body systems interact. And we strategize formulations that work across a wide range of individual physiologies, resulting in a product lineup that is highly effective for almost everyone. Though no uncustomized product can work for 100% of people, our goal is to get as close as possible. Part of this standard requires an unmatched degree of investment in our research and development, which includes:

#### Ridiculously High Ingredient & Quality Standards

Our quality control standards are the defining characteristic of our brand. We go far beyond basics like 3rd party testing. We also invest unparalleled scientific rigor into the exact dose and form of every ingredient, in every product. All Qualia ingredients are vegan or vegetarian, non-GMO, gluten free, and many are trademarked and/or patented to ensure standardized potency and quality. Many are also clinically researched, and chosen for their preferred bioavailability, even if it makes the ingredient form harder to source. Some ingredients have essentially been rediscovered by our science team, with centuries of ancient use in Eastern medicine practices, backed by emerging Western scientific rigor, including rare ingredients at the forefront of scientific knowledge. And we value transparent formulations, so you know what you're putting in your body. These principles form the foundation of our customer relationships.

#### And If You Disagree? You Don't Pay.

At Qualia, we proudly offer a 100 Day / 100% Money Back Guarantee. If you order a Qualia product, and you don't feel it works better than a competing product, we'll gladly refund you 100% of the product. This guarantee is designed to ensure your complete satisfaction and confidence in choosing Qualia.

Should you wish to initiate a refund, please contact us via phone, text, or email, and we will promptly provide clear instructions on how to complete your return. We are happy to assist you throughout the process to ensure it's handled smoothly and efficiently.

Please note that the 100 Day Money Back Return Policy applies to one unit of each product per household and does not extend to additional units or subsequent orders. Each household is eligible for one (1) guarantee per product. For purchases made through Amazon, please initiate a "Request a Refund" ticket via your Amazon account. Learn more about our refund policy,
[here.](https://www.qualialife.com/faqs/what-is-our-refund-policy)

![Qualia Logo](https://cdn1.neurohacker.com/x2allvw7sjmj4wmfdt7pokm86hxu.png)

We are focused on making groundbreaking products for health and well-being through complex systems science.

[Home](https://www.qualialife.com/)>[Blog](https://www.qualialife.com/blog)> Neurohacker Collective Is Becoming Qualia Life Sciences 

 Last Updated on May 21, 2024 

# Neurohacker Collective Is Becoming Qualia Life Sciences

![Image 3](https://cdn1.neurohacker.com/Y4LvgUgMLQ2ZVtFYuhNQpizD.jpg) Written by [Tina Gammon](https://www.qualialife.com/people/staffwriters) , reviewed by [Dr. Gregory Kelly](https://www.qualialife.com/people/greg-kelly)

![Image 4: Neurohacker Collective Is Becoming Qualia Life Sciences](https://cdn1.neurohacker.com/8qudexnf2gqp6nhh7nrj12v1yxw5.jpg)

Neurohacker Collective is becoming Qualia Life Sciences.

Our [Qualia supplement](https://www.qualialife.com/shop) line blends ingredients to complement each other for a targeted net effect within the body.

Since 2016, Neurohacker Collective has been releasing supplement products under the Qualia brand name. "The name Neurohacker Collective made sense when we focused solely on brain health and mental performance products, but our continued growth and expansion into longevity and other high-growth categories now makes that name selection too limiting", said CEO James Schmachtenberger. As such, the company will start operating under the DBA Qualia Life Sciences. The company's ecommerce store will be hosted on qualialife.com.

"Our science and advisory team has grown in recent years, allowing us to broaden our scope of formulation. We're now formulating products with as much emphasis on life sciences beyond neuroscience as within it."

The word [qualia](https://www.qualialife.com/) is a philosophical term meaning "the experience of being oneself", such as the uniqueness of one person experiencing the color red compared to another person.

"The idea behind the Qualia brand was always to empower the unique potential of each human experience, and with our broadening health focuses, the name captures that intent perfectly." adds Schmachtenberger.

The health formulas created by Qualia Life Sciences often combine a multitude of ingredients to complement each other for a targeted net effect within the human body. This formulation method supports balanced regulatory systems within the human body to enhance health, rather than overriding the body's regulatory systems to achieve a short-sighted effect.

Their holistic approach has won praise from naturopathic communities and mainstream health influencers such as Ben Greenfield, Dave Asprey, Dr. Molly Maloof, and more.

"We're excited our approach is resulting in product requests across a large spectrum of health needs," adds Schmachtenberger. "Qualia Life Sciences is up for that challenge."

## About Qualia Life Sciences

Qualia Life Sciences was established in 2015 to enhance the quality of life through cutting-edge wellbeing formulations. Their science team emphasizes the principles of naturopathy and has pioneered formulation techniques using complex systems science, which recognizes the body's inherent self-regulation capacity as a key factor in addressing various health issues. Their expanding product lineup addresses a wide variety of health needs, such as [aging](https://www.qualialife.com/shop/qualia-life), [brain health](https://www.qualialife.com/shop/qualia-mind), [senescent cells](https://www.qualialife.com/shop/qualia-senolytic), [sleep](https://www.qualialife.com/shop/qualia-night), [skin](https://www.qualialife.com/shop/qualia-skin), and energy, with many products under development.

Source: [PR Newswire](https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/neurohacker-collective-is-becoming-qualia-life-sciences-302159509.html)

# Dr. Gregory Kelly

Chief Product Officer

## Biography

Gregory Kelly is Chief Product Officer at Qualia Life Sciences, naturopathic physician (N.D.), and author of the book Shape Shift. He was the editor of the journal Alternative Medicine Review and has been an instructor at the University of Bridgeport in the College of Naturopathic Medicine, where he taught classes in Advanced Clinical Nutrition, Counseling Skills, and Doctor-Patient Relationships. Dr. Kelly has published hundreds of articles on natural medicine and nutrition, contributed three chapters to the Textbook of Natural Medicine, and has more than 30 journal articles indexed on Pubmed. His areas of expertise include nootropics, anti-aging and regenerative medicine, weight management, sleep and the chronobiology of performance and health.

[**Download headshot**](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1zuKZocHH7GaiYHcLr4pb9ioVDQLM9IQh/view?usp=sharing)**.**

# Dan Pardi, MS, PhD

Chief Health Officer

Dr. Dan Pardi is the **Chief Health Officer at Qualia Life Science****s,** where he leads health education, protocol design, and health-improvement strategies. His work centers on translating cutting-edge science into actionable information and programs that support healthspan optimization and peak performance.

Previously, Dan founded [humanOS.me](https://humanos.me/), a digital health platform developed with over 100 health-science professors. Its podcast, [humanOS Radio](https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/humanos-radio/id1115847173), became the official podcast of the Sleep Research Society and a content partner of the Buck Institute for Research on Aging. He also served as Chief Health Architect at Restore Hyper Wellness, where he led new product strategy and served as key authority for intervention sciences.

Through Vivendi Health, Dan provides bespoke consulting to individuals and organizations facing unique health challenges. He holds a PhD in Cognitive Neuroscience from Leiden University and Stanford, and a Master’s in Exercise Physiology from Florida State. He’s spoken at TEDx, the Institute for Human Machine Cognition, among others.

**Learn More**

1.   [**Humanos.me**](https://www.humanos.me/)

# How do I contact Qualia Life Sciences?

Customer Support can be reached via email: [[email protected]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection)

You can also reach us by text/phone at 855-281-2328

Mon-Fri 10am-4pm EST for incoming calls / Mon-Fri 9am-5pm EST business hours

### More Frequently Asked Questions

###### Do you have a Wholesale Program?

We do indeed have a [wholesale program](https://www.qualialife.com/wholesale) and would love to work with you.

Our wholesale program allows, health & wellness business owners, physicians and practitioners the opportunity to provide customers and clients with Qualia premium products.

For more details and to apply, please visit our [wholesale program page](https://www.qualialife.com/wholesale)

For more details and to apply, please visit our [wholesale program page](https://www.qualialife.com/wholesale)

###### Do you have an Affiliate program?

Thanks for your interest in working with Qualia.

Please sign up on our [Partner Page](https://www.qualialife.com/partner/) and someone will get in touch with you.

We look forward to reaching out as soon as we're able regarding your application.

###### How can I listen to or watch the Collective Insights podcast?

Thank you so much for your support!  Subscribe, review and spread the word

###### Are you just another nootropic company that makes false claims?

The supplement industry is indeed the “Wild West” and there are a lot of snake oil salesmen out there with false claims and no ethical standards. Part of what inspired the creation of Qualia was in response to this exact problem.

We have non-proprietary formulations we publish exactly what’s in our product, with the exact amounts. We publish links to the research that support their safety and efficacy, which includes Phase II & III university and clinical trials, strong quantified self research data, and over 40+ years international research on nootropic stack formulation. We specifically designed our product with a set of ethical guidelines, so that we would avoid things like dependence or down regulation. In addition, the formulation was designed to produce long-term benefits to the brain, supporting the growth of new neurons, synaptic connections, neuroprotection, and so on.

Qualia recently began a [pilot study](https://www.qualialife.com/qualia-mind-pilot-study) using the CBS Health platform powered by Cambridge Brain Sciences (CBS) — a leading provider of cognitive testing tools—to help customers receive quantitative feedback on their current brain health. In the initial pilot study, customers were self-selected and offered free cognitive testing with the purchase of Qualia Mind.

Here are some of the highlights from that [pilot study](https://www.qualialife.com/qualia-mind-pilot-study)

### The Results

The results for the 23 eligible subjects revealed meaningful improvement in core cognitive areas of reasoning, verbal ability and concentration. After 5 days of taking Qualia Mind, participants saw:

![](https://cdn1.neurohacker.com/uploads/PIlot_15.png)

**85.4%**increase in scores to measure ability to concentrate/avoid distraction

![](https://cdn1.neurohacker.com/uploads/PIlot_18.png)

**37.2%**increase in scores for planning skills

![](https://cdn1.neurohacker.com/uploads/PIlot_20.png)

**31.1%**increase in scores for visual representation

![](https://cdn1.neurohacker.com/uploads/PIlot_22.png)

**16.9%**increase in scores for verbal reasoning

![](https://cdn1.neurohacker.com/uploads/PIlot_26.png)

**13.3%**increase in scores for verbal short-term memory

For the full results and details from the CBS pilot study visit the [CBS study page.](https://www.qualialife.com/qualia-mind-pilot-study)

The supplement industry is indeed the “Wild West” and there are a lot of snake oil salesmen out there with false claims and no ethical standards. Part of what inspired the creation of Qualia was in response to this exact problem.

We have non-proprietary formulations we publish exactly what’s in our product, with the exact amounts. We publish links to the research that support their safety and efficacy, which includes Phase II & III university and clinical trials, strong quantified self research data, and over 40+ years international research on nootropic stack formulation. We specifically designed our product with a set of ethical guidelines, so that we would avoid things like dependence or down regulation. In addition, the formulation was designed to produce long-term benefits to the brain, supporting the growth of new neurons, synaptic connections, neuroprotection, and so on.

###### Can Nootropics really make you smarter?

Actually, there is a wealth of research that supports nootropics having the ability to increase mental functions such as focus, memory, mood enhancement, motivation, neuroprotection, verbal fluency, as well as a lessening of anxiety. Certain supplements and chemicals enhance the way the brain communicates. We list studies to support each of the ingredients in Qualia on the [Formulation page](http://qualialife.com/formulation).

###### What does Qualia mean?

Qualia is to capture the subjective, first-person qualities of conscious experience—what it feels like to see red, taste sweetness, or feel pain. They highlight the distinction between the objective, physical description of a stimulus and the personal, lived experience of it, emphasizing the "what it is like" aspect of consciousness.

They highlight the distinction between the objective, physical description of a stimulus and the personal, lived experience of it, emphasizing the "what it is like" aspect of consciousness.

###### Who owns Qualia?

Qualia was founded in 2015. It was founded by James Schmachtenberger (CEO). The founder and leadership team oversee the brand’s direction, with James Schmachtenberger serving as the current CEO.

###### Is Qualia 3rd party tested?

Yes, Qualia is third-party tested. Qualia is manufactured in USA FDA registered facilities, and all manufacturers have Third Party cGMP certification. Our formulations are also tested and screened for purity/potency, heavy metals, yeast and mold, microbial contaminants, and gluten and verified to be non-GMO. We also test the finished product to further ensure quality during manufacturing.

###### How long has Qualia been around?

Qualia was founded in 2015 with the mission of creating best in class well-being products by employing a unique methodology to research and development based on complex systems science. This scientific approach focuses on supporting the body’s ability to self-regulate, rather than overriding regulatory systems with chemicals designed to move a biomarker in a particular direction. The company began with a focus on cognitive products with the launch of its Qualia nootropic line and will continue to provide comprehensive products for overall peak performance.
